def positive_entrypoint_builds_dependency_graph_inside_hot_function():
    rule_id = "entrypoint_builds_dependency_graph_inside_hot_function"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag request, batch, or loop entrypoints that reconstruct clients, caches, or providers on each call instead of wiring them once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
